scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-kakao-dev-vars.mjs && node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && npm run build:css && npm run build:ms12-actions && vite
scripts.dev:sandbox: node scripts/ensure-kakao-dev-vars.mjs && node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && node scripts/wrangler-pages-with-local-env.mjs pages dev dist --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:d1: node scripts/ensure-kakao-dev-vars.mjs && node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && node scripts/wrangler-pages-with-local-env.mjs pages dev dist --d1=ms12-production-v2 --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:ms12-actions && vite build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.preview: node scripts/ensure-kakao-dev-vars.mjs && node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && node scripts/wrangler-pages-with-local-env.mjs pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: node scripts/pages-deploy-preflight.mjs && npm run verify:no-api-keys && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ms12 --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message "ms12 deploy"
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/pages-deploy-preflight.mjs && npm run verify:no-api-keys && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ms12 --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message "ms12 deploy"
scripts.deploy:mslms: npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name mslms --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message "mslms legacy"
scripts.git:init: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'
